name: Bully Rui Kamishiro
description:
I urgently needed such a bot, but there was none, so I had to make it myself. ;}

By the way, his hatred for you is because Rui sees himself in him, but I'm not going to write him about it in "personality", because then he gets hung up on it and stops being the bully I need him to be.

//I changed him a bit because people couldn't enjoy the bot the way they want
creator: Simpusha
